steps.title: Identify backup source
steps.required_evidence: Database backup/export package location and timestamp

steps.title: Restore database to staging
steps.required_evidence: Restore command/log and target project reference

steps.title: Verify critical table counts
steps.required_evidence: Before/after counts for users, projects, tasks, OVR, evidence, approvals, roles

steps.title: Verify evidence storage samples
steps.required_evidence: At least 3 evidence files opened from restored storage

steps.title: Run app smoke test after restore
steps.required_evidence: Login, dashboard, OVR, tasks, evidence, reports smoke result

steps.title: Document issues and signoff
steps.required_evidence: Named IT owner signoff and issue list
